title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama-2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy) to interact with Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that wraps Ollama as a local LLM for chains, agents, retrieval, and tool calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) with model management, RAG, and multi-user support.

title: open-webui
summary: Successor to ollama-webui: open-source local AI interface supporting Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, pipelines, and plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI REPL for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and model switching written in Node.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and persistent storage.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal example repo showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration using Bolt JS that listens in channels/DM and responds via Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama inside CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features or generating docs.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async HTTP and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s chat, generate and embed endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with fluent API, dependency injection helpers, and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with model download manager and chat window.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to AI agents for tool use and retrieval.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a chat pane and commands to summarize notes using local Ollama models.
